alkylation reagent: 10 mM Chloracetamide to denature proteins and alkylate cysteine residues.
alkylation concentration: 10 mM Chloracetamide to denature proteins and alkylate cysteine residues.
cleavage agent: complete digestion by trypsin and streptavidin-affinity purification of biotinylated peptides.
enrichment method: complete digestion by trypsin and streptavidin-affinity purification of biotinylated peptides.
fragmentation method: data acquisition using synchronous precursor selection MS3 (SPS-MS3) acquisition mode.
instrument: analyzed in an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos (Thermo Fisher Scientific).
labeling: TMT labelling was performed directly on beads using 60 μg per sample and channel using 10-plex.
